title: Introduction to Software Engineering
simpleExplanation: This course teaches how software is planned, designed, built, tested and improved.
professionalUse: Use software engineering methods to organize any application project.

title: Getting Started with Git and GitHub
simpleExplanation: Git tracks changes in a project. GitHub stores and shares the project online.
professionalUse: Build a professional portfolio and show project progress to employers.

title: Introduction to HTML, CSS, & JavaScript
simpleExplanation: HTML gives structure, CSS gives style, and JavaScript adds interaction.
professionalUse: Create the visible interface of an application.

title: Developing Front-End Apps with React
simpleExplanation: React helps create modern interfaces by dividing the page into reusable components.
professionalUse: Build the frontend dashboard of Engineer Method OS.

title: Developing Back-End Apps with Node.js and Express
simpleExplanation: Node.js runs JavaScript on the server. Express helps create routes and APIs.
professionalUse: Build the backend API of Engineer Method OS.

title: Python for Data Science, AI & Development
skill: Use Python for development, data and AI
simpleExplanation: Python is useful for automation, data analysis, backend tools and AI applications.

title: Developing AI Applications with Python and Flask
simpleExplanation: Flask allows Python applications to receive requests and return responses.
professionalUse: Create an AI assistant module for Engineer Method OS.

title: Introduction to Containers with Docker, Kubernetes and OpenShift
simpleExplanation: Containers help run applications in a stable and portable environment.
professionalUse: Prepare the application for professional deployment.

title: Application Development using Microservices and Serverless
simpleExplanation: Microservices divide an application into smaller services. Serverless runs functions without managing servers.
professionalUse: Help Engineer Method OS grow into independent modules later.

title: Software Developer Career Guide and Interview Preparation

professionalUse: Prepare LinkedIn, GitHub, resume, portfolio and job interviews.

title: JavaScript Programming Essentials
simpleExplanation: This course builds the core programming logic used in JavaScript applications.
professionalUse: Create functions, conditions, arrays and logic for web applications.

title: Node.js and MongoDB: Developing Back-end Database Applications

professionalUse: Store courses, concepts, code models and projects in Engineer Method OS.

title: Introduction to DevOps
simpleExplanation: DevOps connects development and operations to deliver software faster and better.

title: Introduction to Agile Development and Scrum
simpleExplanation: Agile helps build projects step by step. Scrum organizes teamwork with roles and sprints.

simpleExplanation: Linux commands help manage files, folders, servers and automation tasks.

title: Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery CI/CD
simpleExplanation: CI/CD automatically checks and prepares code when changes are pushed.

title: Application Security for Developers and DevOps Professionals
simpleExplanation: Security helps protect data, users and application logic.

title: Monitoring and Observability for Development and DevOps
simpleExplanation: Monitoring helps understand if an application is running well or failing.

title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence AI
simpleExplanation: AI allows machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence.
